text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ha-yaaa!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiiiigh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh, third place again! I couldn't keep up at
the end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is having several scrimmages as part
of her training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But it was amazing how you caught up during the
straight! You really had me sweating!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have to say... You never fail to impress me,
Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You consistently finished third in both the
3000-meter race we had now and the
2000-meter race earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your performance ignores the distance, track
condition, and type of course. This means that
you have real potential.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Of course. That's my forte!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the Mejiros leave...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, that back there? Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I used to never say things like "third place is my
forte."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Now I accept it as being a part of who I am.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Plus, being known as a racer who does well under
pressure has a nice ring to it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me, Trainer... No more unrealistic
goals, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It'll make me want to meet those high
expectations of yours!
